summary:
ELON MUSK AND THE MARK OF THE BEAST SYSTEM: Brandon warns that Elon Musk's technological ventures, specifically Neuralink and Starlink, are foundational elements of the biblical mark of the beast system. He claims that Musk is influenced by demonic spirits known as Nephilim and that his public persona as a savior of America is deceptive. While Brandon expresses a desire for Musk's salvation, he insists that Musk's push toward a digital platform and artificial intelligence represents a rapid descent into an unavoidable, worldwide apocalyptic system. Furthermore, Brandon asserts that the impending collapse of the American dollar and the introduction of a new financial structure through specific cryptocurrencies like XRP and XLM are orchestrated steps toward this global beast system.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND THE END TIMES ANTICHRIST: Brandon predicts the imminent outbreak of the Ezekiel 38 and 39 war, describing an alliance between Russia, North Korea, Iran, Syria, and Turkey. He details a vision of untrained North Korean soldiers being sent to fight in Ukraine, which he believes will escalate into World War III. Additionally, Brandon identifies French President Emmanuel Macron as a dangerous, Hitler-like figure whom he refers to as an Ishmael, but clarifies that Macron is not the Antichrist. Instead, he claims the true Antichrist is a Muslim figure known as the Mahdi, whom he suspects to be Mohammed bin Salman. According to Brandon, this hidden figure is currently being groomed to emerge on the world stage with false promises of peace for Israel and Syria.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND POLITICAL TURMOIL: Brandon recounts visions of imminent domestic disasters, warning of a Red Dawn scenario involving Russian forces in Cuba and a Trojan horse infiltration within the United States, which he blames on the previous political administration. He prophesies a massive, sudden attack reminiscent of 9/11, specifically detailing explosive-laden drones targeting major football and baseball stadiums. Furthermore, he warns that ten American cities have been heavily infiltrated by hidden enemies. In the political sphere, Brandon addresses rumors about Donald Trump and the Epstein list, characterizing the allegations as a smear campaign orchestrated by figures like Musk because Trump failed to support specific political mandates. He also claims to have seen visions of rats or traitors operating secretly within the Pentagon.

MANUFACTURED PLAGUES AND DIVINE PROTECTION: Brandon shares a prophetic warning about a coming global pandemic. He claims this virus will be engineered using artificial intelligence, will have no available vaccine, and is specifically designed to target obese individuals. Despite these frightening predictions, he urges his listeners not to succumb to fear but to rely entirely on divine protection by intimately knowing Psalm 91 and Psalm 23. He stresses the critical importance of spiritual sensitivity, advising his audience to listen to the still, small voice of God, which may provide life-saving directions or divine delays to keep them away from targeted locations like workplaces or large public gatherings.

SPIRITUAL AWAKENING AND CHURCH UNITY: Brandon passionately calls for an end to spiritual slumber, declaring that a massive awakening and divine shaking are about to occur. He heavily emphasizes the necessity of unity within the Christian body, explicitly condemning the lone ranger mentality and comparing the church to a grand symphony or a vital puzzle where every individual plays an essential part. During a communion segment, he focuses on healing, redemption, and the cleansing power of Jesus's blood. Looking forward to this great revival, Brandon prophesies that God will release a massive influx of wealth and financial resources to fund the movement, comparing it to the overwhelming surplus of sanctuary offerings collected by Moses in the book of Exodus. He concludes by encouraging believers to demonstrate Christ's love through simple, everyday interactions rather than using aggressive condemnation.
rawData: [June 07, 2025]-[In prayer today the Lord showed me an alarm clock]-[https://youtu.be/bh5qXAKfSpM]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. Well, I don't even really know what to say about all this, the whole Elon Musk-Trump thing. And they're saying, people are all like, "Hey, Brandon, you hit it right on. You said all this and everything." Folks, I'm going to tell you, it's all about God here. We're excited about that. He's given us these things to pray about. I deflect. I told you we stay vertical. But I'm going to tell you this. The Lord told me this morning, he said, "Just because it's public knowledge today, what I've been talking to you about in private doesn't mean you camp there. I have much more to share with you about what's to come. You must warn my body. You must tell them that I'm coming, Brandon. You must tell them. If you don't have a saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ and you understand that he loves you, he died for you, he rose again on the third day, and that he has a plan for your life, you're in trouble." That's the most important thing that I can ever tell you out of any prophetic word that I ever give on this channel is: do you know the Lord Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior? That's all that matters. Nothing else matters. If you die today, where will you spend eternity? That's what I have to ask you today. All the other stuff—"But Brandon, you see about the volcanoes, all these other things"—it doesn't matter if you die today, right? All you need to know is, "Do I have Jesus Christ?" And I want to drive that home before I start. You must know him, and he must know you. So, do I believe Elon Musk has good intentions? People want to ask me, "Do you think he's trying to save America? Do you think..." Folks, I told you I believe the man is building the mark of the beast with Neuralink. I told you that Starlink is going to communicate with Neuralink. All the signs of the times are happening. I told you Elon Musk had Nephilim behind him. And I hope I said that right this time, Nephilim, those demonic spirits. It wasn't that he was being influenced by a demonic-looking devil that the Lord told me was a Nephilim, right? So, he's like a hybrid. The way he thinks is not normal. Do you understand what I'm trying to tell you all? So, he's building the beast system. He's building the mark of the beast. He's building, I believe, the technical stuff for it—for the chip to put in you, for the satellites to communicate. So we're seeing all that stuff coming about. Then he comes out, and I said he'll come out as a good guy. Look at how he comes out. Everybody loves him. He's a great guy. You know, we pray for his soul. We pray for his salvation. We pray that the Lord Jesus Christ saves him. He could help the kingdom of God with Starlink. We know he could. But really, I know of the foundation of crypto. I've warned you all about all these things that are coming. There are secret ties to other nations with this man. There are dark things that people do not realize. Elon Musk is coming out and saying all these things about the budget, the $5 trillion. Well, you're trying to sink America. America's done, folks. You may not like what I'm about to say, but the beast system, the mark of the beast system, the digital platform is being ushered in at a freight-train rate right now. Do you understand? The dollar is done. I need you to hear me. The dollar is done. And they know it's done. Jerome Powell knows there's nothing they can do to save this economy. No matter how much Trump tries to pump things up and tell you that we're going to save America and make America great again, America is going into the beast system. I need you to hear me. We may have a window of opportunity of what I'm praying for and what I continue to tell you. God wants to give each and every single one of you, a remnant that are watching me right now, a window of opportunity to get your house in order because the great day of destruction, great days of tribulation, the birthing pains are upon us, and he's giving you a window to get stuff ready. The $5 trillion—the reason why Trump, they're like, "The ship's sinking, folks, let's go down with the party." Do you understand? They know there's nothing they can do. We're already at like almost 40-some trillion dollars in debt, right? What's another five trillion? Can you turn it around at 40 trillion? Do you know how much money it would take to turn that around? How much interest and all the things that it takes? But it's not just about America; it's a worldwide economic disaster from China to Japan to all these nations. And what's going to come in the days ahead, remember what I'm telling you, you need to hear me, is a digital platform through crypto, and it will be the mark of the beast eventually, but they have to introduce it. A spoonful of sugar makes the medicine go down. They'll bring it out a little at a time. They'll bring it out and they're going to get a foundation laid, and it will be through certain cryptos. And I've told you I pray over XRP, XLM, the banking sector, the banking stuff. Watch the AI. Pay attention to AI. AI is the new industrial revolution. Everything that AI is doing is bringing forth a new system, and it is exploding at such a rapid speed that they won't be able to keep up with it. It will start to think on its own in a way that we can't comprehend. Like, you think Terminator was a big deal? This is what I'm talking about. A beast system is playing out in front of your eyes. Folks, Jesus is coming. Jesus is coming. He warned us that all these things would happen. Now, we are about to see—I want you to listen to me—we are about to see the Ezekiel 38 and 39 war. Gog and Magog, Russia, and I believe it's Turkey, Iran, and Syria will be involved. You're going to see an escalation of war in the days ahead. The Ezekiel 38 and 39 war is about to happen very soon. So we see Vladimir Putin and Kim Jong-un making an alliance, and Kim Jong-un is basically saying that he is going to, at all costs, do whatever it takes to go and back up Vladimir Putin with the war. This is exactly what the spirit of the Lord warned you was going to take place. And I saw men from North Korea on trains being shipped over to Ukraine. And this will escalate this even more into World War III. And you will see North Korea back Russia with men. I saw farmers, men that were not trained to fight, and they were slaughtered on the battlefield. This is very serious. In the days ahead, I saw NATO coming in agreement, like with the UK and other nations, all coming together to try to defeat Putin. They want a boogeyman, do you understand? They're wanting to escalate this. They need war; it stimulates the economy. There are things that happen, right? But Macron will come across as a Hitler in the days ahead, and he will be a very big voice of people saying he will be a major mouthpiece in this end-time war: Macron. And when this takes place, everybody's watching and thinking he's the Antichrist, but the Lord said to me, "Brandon, he is not the Antichrist. He is an Ishmael." For the Antichrist is behind the door, behind a curtain—the Mahdi. They will call him the Mahdi. He is a Muslim man, and he is behind a curtain, and he's being groomed by the devil right now as we speak. He's being prepared to come on the world stage. Many people do not know this. They think, "Well, it's Macron. It's Obama. It's all..." No, these are not the Antichrist. The Antichrist is being groomed. So, if Macron is the Ishmael, that means he's really going to rise up in power in the days ahead, and then he'll fade away a little, or be taken out or something. I don't know. But I know that the main man is behind a curtain right now. He's not been revealed. And I believe—I've always told you who that man is—and he's coming on the world stage saying, "I'll cause peace with Israel." I'll cause peace. Let's have friends with Syria. Let's do all these things." Right? That's MBS. I warned you about MBS. I've told you to pray over MBS, that you won't be deceived by this man. Maybe I'm wrong about it. I've been wrong about some things, but I'm going to tell you in my spirit, I still pray over this. So, is there any hope for the dollar? I don't see any long-term hope. No long-term hope. It's all setting up for a beast system. So, there's that part of it. So, is Elon Musk wrong by saying what he says? No. No. So, the other part, the Epstein list. Do I believe that Trump is on the Epstein list? I don't doubt that he is, but I don't believe it's with a minor. I do not believe in my spirit that it's with a minor. It doesn't justify being on the list, ladies and gentlemen. I'm not justifying it, but I'm trying to say, is it criminal activity to prosecute him and get him impeached for it? That's the question you have to ask. I don't see that. If they would have already had that information through the last administration and saw his name on that list, he would already be in handcuffs. You have to say the man would already be arrested. But if it wasn't with a minor, then they can't prosecute him. So that has to show. Elon Musk coming out and saying he's on the Epstein list—I don't doubt that he could be, but is it prosecutable? That's what you have to ask. So, it's just a smear campaign. You know, "You didn't do what I told you to do. You didn't help me out with my mandate on my Teslas and the electric EV mandate, and you're not helping me out. You didn't give me..." So, the honeymoon's over, right? The rat that I've always warned you about—the rat is coming out of who he really is. It is what it is, folks. And I pray for his salvation. I'm not here to be a cyberbully and go, "You're this, you're that." No, we pray for the man. We intercede for him to get born again. But my job is to warn you of that which is to come, warning the people, warning the president. And so, what else did you see, Brandon? "So I saw a man that's in the Pentagon that is a rat. I saw different people in there that are rats. I can't go into depth about that. If the government was to reach out, like Trump's cabinet, and they would ask me anything, I would tell them. But I just feel some of these things I see, it's not wise to talk about over an open air. It's a white man. So, I'll just leave that there. But you know what? God's got this, folks. And the sky is not falling. No matter what you see in the news in the days ahead from Elon trying to badger him, I warned you. Elon Musk was put in a position that I saw, in DOGE, that he saw things that he shouldn't have. That's what I'll say. There'll be more things that come out in the news about this in the days ahead. More of a smear campaign. And I've touched on it enough today. I think that's enough. I don't feel peace about going down that road. So what are we waiting for? What are we watching for right now? We're looking for what the Lord has for us today. Like I said, this is old news. Everything that I've talked about now is old news. Watch Cuba. The Lord, when I got that prophetic word—all of it on my archives, private stuff that I never released publicly—the Lord said, "Watch Cuba. Remember the Cuban missile crisis. Watch Russia in Cuba. Remember this. Behind closed doors, there are things that you do not know. A red dawn experience is coming. The enemy within—a Trojan horse. Many think this is terrorist-related, but it is not. It is an act of war within. They have infiltrated over the last four years of our last administration. Thank you, Joe Biden. They are here, and you'll remember this in the days ahead. We must pray for our protection. You must pray that you're always in the right place at the right time—not in fear, but listening to that still small voice inside of you. For many people in the days ahead, if you are not listening to the Spirit of the Lord, the peace following that peace—if you feel funny about it, like 'I don't feel like we should go here,' listen to it. It could cost you your life. You need to hear the Lord on where to be. He said, 'Don't go to work.' Remember 9/11? Don't go to work today. Many people didn't show up because, I remember hearing stories of Christians who said, 'I didn't feel good about it,' or 'I got delayed and I didn't show up on time.' Sometimes there are divine delays. Sometimes God puts divine delays in your path to protect you. So you need to know the voice of the Father in these last days. And how do you do that? By praying, by seeking Him, by reading your Bible. And if He tells you, 'Don't go to that baseball game'—remember I told you I saw drones. Remember I said I saw drones with C4 on them flying into big stadiums and being set off. Remember, I saw major football games and baseball games, when people are distracted watching a game, I saw drones coming in with explosives and doing these things. The Lord told me there's a major event that's about to take place. Everything we know will change within a 24-hour period. You'll wake up one day, and when that happens, it will be such a major event that takes place that everything—just like 9/11 was. I need you to know this. Just like 9/11, it changed the course of history. It changed the world. And there's a major event that's about to take place. You need to watch for these ten cities. These ten cities, they've not disappeared. I've warned you. Even when I was on Alex Jones' show, I warned everybody of ten cities. They have infiltrated ten cities, and these men have not disappeared. What will they do? Just remember what I've told you all. We still pray over these things. I see way in advance, folks. Remember, the things the Lord warns you about is so we can pray about it as a family. It's not so it happens the next day. Sometimes it does, but a lot of things the Lord says, 'I'm going to give you time because I know people are lazy and they don't want to pray.' A lot of people. So, 'I'll give you months ahead, I'll give you a year ahead to warn you of that which is to come.' Watch these next several months through the summer. We pray over the fourteenth, we pray over the Fourth of July, we pray over any kind of major gatherings of people, and we pray protection that no harm would come nigh any human being at all. And we pray for revival to break across America and around this world, that a major outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord would show up and show off in a way that we've never seen before, that we would have a great harvest of souls, all for the kingdom of God. We know that the Lord has warned me about a major virus coming, a major virus that's worse than the Black Death that happened in the 1300s, I believe is when it was. A major plague that will be created by AI technology, that there will be no vaccination for, that is designed to wipe out people that are obese. Remember this. I don't say that to scare you. My word, I say that to prepare you. Can you pray against it? I pray against it, but I've seen it keep... it's still coming. It's still coming. And I'm not scared of it. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord, ladies and gentlemen. That's that. But we pray. This is what the Lord said to me: 'If you don't know Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 in the days ahead, you won't make it.' What does that say? That's how bold He is to me. That's what my intimate conversations with Him are. 'Brandon, if you don't have an understanding of who you are in Me in the days ahead, for great dark days are coming. It will be like a quarter.' Ladies and gentlemen, I've said this so many times. It will be like a quarter. It's that thin. There'll be gross darkness that you can touch on one side and great light on the other, and they will coexist together. You'll see the light rising up upon the church and you'll see great darkness upon the world. You can choose to look at either one. You can go horizontal and let things of this earth get to you, and you'll live in fear, and it'll freak you out and everything. Or you can go vertical and keep your eyes on Jesus. It's a choice. We cannot focus on the darkness. We focus on the light, and in Him, that He is the light. He is love, and He's coming back for His church. But He told us these things would come before He came. So let's pray. Let's pray together, and let's see if the Lord—He said, 'I have more things to show you. Don't camp here.' So I rehearse everything for the new people, and then we go into the river. So who wants to go tubing? That's what I always say. Who wants to go tubing with me? I know it's a serious time, but this is lighthearted to me. This is just fellowship. And He'll tell us what's to come, folks. But we don't have to be all, 'Oh, the sky is falling.' No, it's not. The sky is not falling. We have Jesus. And we're looking up, for our redemption draws nigh. But we come to Him boldly as His children, and He shows you that which is to come. And I believe He wants to show us things. He may not today. He may, I don't know. It's what He says. But we know that He loves us, and He'll never leave us, and He'll never forsake us. But we always take communion here as a family. We always go before Him with communion before we pray. So we lift up this body before You, Father. And we thank You for the greatest outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord this world has ever seen before the end is coming. And I believe, God, that we're about to see great demonstrations and manifestations of the glory of God. I take this body in the name of Jesus. And I thank You, Lord, that You were wounded for our transgressions, You were bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon You, and with Your stripes, Lord, we are healed. And we take this body in the name of Jesus. And I thank You, Father, that no weapon formed against us is going to prosper. And I take this body and I say, 'God, I am healed. I am whole. I am well because of what You did on that cross for me. Thank You, Lord.' The Bible says that Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law, and in Galatians, Christ has redeemed me from the curse of the law. And I'm not under the curse anymore because of what Jesus did on that cross—not the beautiful cross, but what He did on it was beautiful, what He did for us. Thank You, Lord. Thank You, Lord, for what You did. Thank You, Lord, for dying for me. Thank You, Lord, that You rose again. Thank You, Lord, that I'm set free. We take this body in the name of Jesus, and we take it boldly because we're His kids and this is what He said to do in remembrance of what He did for us. Thank You, Lord. Thank You, Lord. We take it. We take it, Lord. Thank You, Jesus. Now, Lord, we thank You for the blood. We make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We thank You, Lord. He said if you confess your sins, He is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you of all unrighteousness. And I take this blood right now, and I thank You, Lord, that my sins are washed in the blood of Jesus. You took it all for me. You are the sinless and You are perfect, and You were slain for every single one of us. Thank You, Lord. Thank You for Your blood. Thank You that I plead the blood over my children, over my wife, over my finances, over all of it, God, that I'm always in the right place at the right time, doing exactly what You've asked me to do. And I take the blood, and I apply it over any satanic or witchcraft—nothing comes nigh us. Every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it; it falls to the ground. It will not bear fruit in our lives because we're under the blood. We thank You, Lord. 'What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus. What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus.' Do you believe that today? It makes us whole. It makes us white as snow. Jesus cleanses us from head to toe. Glory to God. Thank You for what You did for us, Father. We take this blood in the name of Jesus. Hallelujah. You should get excited about it. He took care of it all for us. And Father, we just come up boldly to Your throne right now. Father, I sit at Your feet. If I could just sit with You a while. I need You to hold me moment by moment till forever passes by. If I could just sit with You a while, I need You to hold me moment by moment till forever passes by. If I could just sit with You a while. I need You to hold me moment by moment till forever passes by. Lord, we come so boldly into Your throne today. If I could just sit with You a while today, Lord, if I could just sit with You a while. We trust You, Father. I need You to hold me. There's no rush. There's just peace. Everything else doesn't matter. Your agenda for today—what do you have to do today that's so important? We're in a hurry to go nowhere. We're in a hurry to go nowhere. All that matters is what we're about to do and spend eternity sitting at His feet, listening to His breath. What does He have to say today to us? You don't put God in a time crunch: 'You must speak in this five minutes or I'm out of here.' Then bye. He will not speak. You don't treat Him that way. Where He is at is in the still, small voice, not in the rush. It's the peace that passes all understanding. It's learning to tell your flesh to shut up. 'Shut up, flesh. I am not going to allow you to rise up and know you've got all these things to do today. Oh my goodness.' No, no, no, no. Peace. He's in the peace. He's in the still, small voice. Moment by moment till forever passes by. Lord, if I could just sit with You a while, I need You to hold me. It's like a dance. We always said, 'Lord, it's like a dance. You lead, we follow.' Father, You're my dad, like a father would love on his child. Today, Father, we sit in Your lap, not worried about all the things of this world. We take our care out of our prayer and we just sit at Your feet. 'When I cannot feel, when my wounds don't heal, Lord, I humbly kneel hidden in You.' Thank You, Father. It is Jesus. It is Jesus. We need more, Father, revelation of who You are. Holy, holy, holy is the Lord who was and is and is to come. Holy, holy, holy is the Lord who was and is and is to come. Taylor, focus on the task at hand. For many distractions are coming. Many distractions are coming. There'll be many distractions coming in the days ahead to pull your attention away from Him—so many things on the news, so many things happening. There'll be great signs coming in the days ahead. You must pay attention to the Father right now, for many distractions are coming. Fearful sights you will see that will bring many men to their knees. Keep your eyes upon Him. He said 'me,' but I'm saying it's not me. Him. Him. Keep your eyes upon Him. In the days ahead, there'll be all this stuff on the news. I see dust, I see bombs, I see buildings. Remember, keep your eyes upon Him. People have a tendency when they see it to camp around news. It would be like during 9/11; they spent hours watching the news because of what's being reported. Great distractions are coming, not that we care for the fallen, but this is a time that you press in so that you're in the right place at the right time. I hear such a warning. I hear such a warning. I hear echoing, 'Keep your vessel filled. Keep your vessel filled.' For the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. Keep your vessel filled. Being an unfilled vessel makes you unusable. Do you understand? It's like He wants to be you. He wants to move through you. And if you're weak and anemic, you've got to have a backbone like a crowbar. You've got to be filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost in these days ahead. Do you understand? I've seen things being uncovered. Things being uncovered. Look for the opportune times every day. Look for the opportune times every day. The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. Those that are around you, I see them. They're at the grocery stores. They're at the Walmarts. They're at the places you go buy groceries. Do you see? There are so many people that you can be a light to every day. There are so many people that you can show love to every day. Sometimes it's just a smile. These are great days of seriousness. My voice will become clearer, more clear, as you draw near. 'As you draw near,' that's what He said. People, I hear them, and they—I hear them—'It's not clear. It's not clear.' The more you draw near, the clearer it will become. Many are still asleep. I see there's a bed and I see people asleep. And He said, 'Many are asleep.' Many still are asleep. But a great awakening is about to take place. A great awakening. For the alarm clock is about to sound even louder. Do you hear? It is about to go even louder, and a great shaking to awaken. I see a body. I see the vision. This is what I see. And I see Him shaking the body. I see Him shaking the child in the bed saying, 'Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. This is where it's at. The alarm's going off. The alarm is going off in the background on this nightstand.' And I see the nightstand. And I see the clock is at... I see the clock is at... And in this vision, I see the clock is at... And the Lord said, 'It's time to wake up.' But you didn't hear the bell. You did not hear the bell. And therefore, a great shaking to awaken on another level will come. For you are still asleep, but you must come out of the slumber. You must come out of the slumber. For this dispensation of grace is coming to an end. For you will see it come to an end. Tribulation is right at our doorstep. Do you understand? Many are still asleep. Many are still asleep, but they won't be. But they won't be. No more excuses. No more excuses. I hear Him say, 'No more excuses. No more excuses for what's about to happen.' You will wake up. For what's about to take place, many will wake up. But you that are awake, you that are awake, be ready. Be ready. Be ready. For the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. Be ready. It's all hands on deck. It's all hands on deck for what's about to take place. Oh, these will be days of fun. These will be days of fun, for it's just begun. You'll see the entering in like I'm warning you. I'm warning you for 24 hours. In 24, have anticipation. Have anticipation. I hear the Lord say, 'Have anticipation to walk in the divine manifestations.' Do you hear? Have anticipation to walk in the divine manifestations, the manifestations of the glory is what He's talking about. Seeing and knowing, hearing, creative miracles, signs, and wonders will follow them that believe. And you will do things that they've never seen before, creative miracles that they've never seen before, demonstrations and manifestations of the glory they've never seen before. Remember, the shekinah glory cloud is an old thing. 'I'm going to do a new thing,' He says. 'I'm going to do a new thing.' Remember the breeze. I see the breeze. I see the wind. I see tangible wind in services blowing people's hair. A wind like the upper room. I hear the wind. It came as a sound of a mighty rushing wind. But I'm talking about a wind, an actual wind blowing people's hair. Not weird, but the glory. A whirlwind. A whirlwind. Press in here today. Press in right here. Press right here for the manifestations. Press right here for the manifestation. For it has to be coming out of the spirit. Come out of the spirit into the natural. We are coming out of it in Jesus' name. We pour it down in Jesus' name. With much prayer today. With much prayer today. No, no, no. I see a great orchestra. Some are the brass, some the drums, some the cymbals, some the tubas. Usually I see the orchestra. One is not less than the other. Each one plays a vital part of this great symphony. So one doesn't look better than the other. Without the cymbal, the whole thing doesn't sound as beautiful as it could. Don't look at yourself as less than. The Lord says, 'Look at yourself as a vital piece of My puzzle.' You are a vital piece of His puzzle. He says, 'You're not less than.
